Utils¶

CoTracker utilizes the following utilities:

class cotracker.utils.visualizer.Visualizer(save_dir='./results', grayscale=False, pad_value=0, fps=10, mode='rainbow', linewidth=2, show_first_frame=10, tracks_leave_trace=0)¶

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • save_dir (str)

  • grayscale (bool)

  • pad_value (int)

  • fps (int)

  • mode (str)

  • linewidth (int)

  • show_first_frame (int)

  • tracks_leave_trace (int)

draw_tracks_on_video(video, tracks, visibility=None, segm_mask=None, gt_tracks=None, query_frame=0, compensate_for_camera_motion=False, color_alpha=255)¶
Parameters:

  • video (Tensor)

  • tracks (Tensor)

  • visibility (Tensor | None)

  • segm_mask (Tensor | None)

  • color_alpha (int)

save_video(video, filename, writer=None, step=0)¶
visualize(video, tracks, visibility=None, gt_tracks=None, segm_mask=None, filename='video', writer=None, step=0, query_frame=0, save_video=True, compensate_for_camera_motion=False, opacity=1.0)¶
Parameters:

  • video (Tensor)

  • tracks (Tensor)

  • visibility (Tensor | None)

  • gt_tracks (Tensor | None)

  • segm_mask (Tensor | None)

  • filename (str)

  • step (int)

  • save_video (bool)

  • compensate_for_camera_motion (bool)

  • opacity (float)

cotracker.utils.visualizer.add_weighted(rgb, alpha, original, beta, gamma)¶
cotracker.utils.visualizer.draw_circle(rgb, coord, radius, color=(255, 0, 0), visible=True, color_alpha=None)¶
